title: artemisia campestris var. brevicaulis
intro: Artemisia campestris var. brevicaulis, also known as Broom-sage or Western Mugwort, is a variety of the Artemisia campestris plant, a flowering perennial native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Broom-sage include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, soothe colds and flu, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Broom-sage include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
